name: gnars.com
notes: Primary live interface for Gnars DAO on Base. Proposal records are archived via scripts/sync_proposals.py.

name: gnars.wtf
notes: Legacy Base Jump / Gnars V2 surface that should be preserved for continuity.

name: Snapshot V1
notes: Legacy governance interface. Proposal and vote data are reconstructed through the Snapshot GraphQL hub.

name: Snapshot GraphQL Hub
notes: Primary structured source for the gnars.eth proposal archive and vote ledger.

name: Nouns.build Gnars DAO
notes: Formal source for Base onchain activity ingestion tied to the Gnars DAO page on nouns.build.

name: Hive / Peakd @gnars
notes: Historic narrative layer for archival and storytelling.

name: Gnars Discord
notes: Community coordination, operational context, and bot-related history.

name: GnarsV2 Dune Dashboard
notes: Analytics layer for treasury and historical governance metrics.

name: Herd Explorer
notes: Supplementary onchain context layer for contract relationships, proxy implementations, and transaction traces. Best used for Base and Ethereum contract investigation, not Dune-style aggregate analytics.

name: Herd MCP
notes: Official Herd MCP endpoint. As documented on 2026-03-18, supported networks are Ethereum and Base; Polygon is not listed as supported.

name: ETHSkills
notes: Supplemental Ethereum knowledge base for agents. Useful for indexing design, address hygiene, L2 reasoning, and current tooling choices, but not a Gnars-specific source of truth.

name: That's Gnarly Contracts Repo
notes: Primary source for That's Gnarly Base deployments and dependency wiring.
